items.briefing:
The recent Canvas data breach has raised questions about whether organisations should ever pay ransoms when hacked — security experts generally advise against it, as payment doesn't guarantee data recovery or deletion. Meanwhile, global compliance fines surged in early 2026, reminding Australian organisations that poor data handling carries real financial consequences. Scammers continue targeting Australians across multiple channels, with reports of increasingly sophisticated impersonation tactics affecting everyday people and even professional athletes.

For staff at a training organisation, the most practical step right now is to treat any unexpected email, message, or login request with suspicion — if something feels off, report it before clicking.
